caption: A man is seen from the chest up, positioned within a small, rounded rectangular frame centered against a black background. He wears a dark, ornate garment featuring gold-colored embroidery and detailing on the chest and shoulders. He is smiling and looking towards the camera while standing in what appears to be an indoor setting with a neutral-colored wall behind him. Across the four frames, the man remains in a static pose, with very minimal movement, maintaining his expression and position. The text "Seyi Adebola" appears in a small, white sans-serif font in the lower-left corner of the overall image and again in the center-middle of the black background, remaining consistent across the duration of the clip.
